title: Binance Funding Contrarian Scientific Collaboration 35
thesis: Exploit funding extremes, regime shifts, and cross-science features to improve directional funding trades. This variant fuses bayesian/causal researcher guidance with information theory researcher, control/rl researcher to test causal priors and uncertainty-aware edge filtering; entropy compression, surprise detection, and cross-feed information gain; feedback-aware thresholding and action policies that stay robust under execution drift.
guardrails: No live promotion without human approval.
No credentials or hard caps may be mutated.
